---
title: "TITLE"
author: "Scott McCabe"
toc: true
number-sections: true
highlight-style: pygments
format:
  html: 
    code-fold: true
    html-math-method: katex
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true	
  pdf: 
    geometry: 
      - top=30mm
      - left=20mm
execute:
    warning: false
---


## Section 1
```{python}
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv("stats.csv")

# Clearer column name for pitcher_id
df['pitcher_id'] = df['player_id']

# Sorting Data
df = df.sort_values(['pitcher_id', 'year'])

# Target variable
df['target_era_next_year'] = (
  df.groupby('pitcher_id')['p_era'].shift(-1)
)

# Drop rows with missing target variable
df_model = df.dropna(subset=['target_era_next_year']).copy()

# Change IP to a numeric format
def convert_ip(ip):
  ip = float(ip)
  whole = int(ip)
  frac = round(ip - whole, 1)

  if frac == 0.1:
    return whole + 1/3
  elif frac == 0.2:
    return whole + 2/3
  else:
    return whole

df_model['ip_true'] = df_model['p_formatted_ip'].apply(convert_ip)

# Change home run stat to a rate
df_model['hr_per_9'] = df_model['home_run'] / df_model['ip_true'] * 9
```



## Section 2






## References
